title: Wax Instead
description: Tired of using full honeycombs just to wax something? Fear not, you can now make wax!
body:
Turn honeycombs into hard wax (x3), smelt the hard wax to get a useable wax! 

**Requires Fabric API.**

 

The usable wax can be used directly on coppper to wax it, or in a crafting table with copper blocks, just like honeycombs.   
One honeycomb now yields two candles (when using wax as a replacement), with one wax leftover.

The candle recipe for wax is two wax stacked on top of each other, with a string on top of them, it yields two candles.

*   String
*   Wax
*   Wax

## **Developers**

Wax also introduces a few new tags: __waxmod:waxes__ (all waxes in all of their states + honeycomb), __waxmod:softwaxes__ (only smelted/soft waxes), __waxmod:hardwaxes__ 

Using tags is recommended for any mod adding compatibility as there will likely be new waxes added in the future.   
  

All vanilla recipes for waxing accept the #waxmod:waxes tag.
